name: Asian Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse cucumbers and pat dry with paper towels.
2. Add cucumbers to a bowl of cold water for about 10 minutes; this helps remove any bitterness.
3. Drain the cucumbers thoroughly and squeeze out excess moisture.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, sugar, and minced garlic until well combined.
5. Pour dressing over cucumber pieces and toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Add salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve immediately.
